headline: CoreWeave Closes $3.1 Billion Loan Facility, Expanding Access to Public Markets for GPU-Backed Financing
summary: LIVINGSTON, N.J., May 18, 2026--CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV), The Essential Cloud for AI™, today announced it has closed its $3.1 billion delayed draw term loan facility ("DDTL 5.0 Facility"), supporting continued expansion of its AI cloud platform and committed customer deployments.

headline: Following Buffett: Greg Abel Cuts Berkshire Holdings Dating Back To 2011  — But The Big Names Stay Put
summary: Berkshire Hathaway changed its holdings in the first quarter, but its top 10 stocks look the same from the fourth quarter.
